description_long: This is an olive-green boater hat with a flat crown and a wide, flat brim. The hat features a dark gray band encircling the base of the crown, providing a subtle contrast to the main body. The surface of the hat appears to have a slightly textured, matte finish, suggesting a felt or wool material. The crown is low and flat-topped, maintaining a uniform height all around. The brim is broad and even, extending outward in a consistent, circular shape. There are no visible decorative elements beyond the band, and no branding or logos are present.
description: An olive-green boater hat with a flat crown, wide flat brim, and a dark gray band around the base. The surface is matte and slightly textured.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the flat crown, wide brim, and the dark gray band clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the uniform width of the brim and the continuous band around the crown.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, with the band and brim visible but less detail on the front edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the flat crown, wide brim, and the uninterrupted band.
